Sandbox_RefugeDifficulty_tooltip: Overall difficulty level. Easy: lower costs, shorter cooldowns, stronger effects. Hard: higher costs, longer cooldowns, weaker effects.
Sandbox_RefugeEssenceEnabled_tooltip: Advanced setting. Changes the XP essence system (tracks earned XP and spawns essence on death). Use Difficulty instead unless you know what you are doing.
Sandbox_RefugeEssenceRetentionPercent_to: Advanced setting. Base percent of earned XP restored when absorbing an essence. Difficulty modifies this value (max 100%).
